creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 217617
Patch to add entry for udfclientfs in distinfo

If ports option FUSE is enabled, sysutils/udfclient complains about distinfo out of date:

#cd sysutils/udfclient
#make
===>  License ClArtistic accepted by the user
===>   udfclient-0.8.11 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> udfclientfs-0.6.tgz is not in /usr/ports/sysutils/udfclient/distinfo.
=> Either /usr/ports/sysutils/udfclient/distinfo is out of date, or
=> udfclientfs-0.6.tgz is spelled incorrectly.
*** Error code 1

The attached patch should solve the problem with the missing enry for udfclientfs.
